content.en:
This time to the Spirit Race, the Terran sent a Celestial Venerable, but did not send the Supreme.

After all, the opportunity of the Lingyun Heavenly Realm was not important to the entire human race, but it was only more important to the six human gods who went to the Lingyun Heavenly Realm.

If it weren't for the protection of the six Terran gods who went to the Lingyun Heavenly Realm, the Terran wouldn't even send one of the Heavenly Venerables.

But these six great gods are all very important children of the universe of the human race, and the background behind them is very deep, and none of them can be born.

Therefore, it is necessary to send a Celestial Venerable to the Lingyun Heavenly Realm, which also shows the importance of the human race.

Terran ship.

Ye Tian met with the other five great gods and chatted briefly for a while.

These five great gods are not the highnesses of the supreme hall of the human race, but the inheritance of the Daozi from the nine supreme-level forces.

After all, the Great God-level Highness of the Supreme Hall of the Human Race actually doesn't have a deep background, and it is difficult to get a place to enter the Lingyun Heavenly Realm.

Therefore, the other five gods who can come this time may not be very strong, but their backgrounds are definitely very deep.

Ye Tian gradually learned their identities from the mouths of these five great gods, and they were all the heirs of the Supremes.

In terms of background, Ye Tian is indeed inferior to these five great gods, but in terms of strength and importance, Ye Tian is much stronger than them.

Because of this, these five great gods did not dare to offend Ye Tian at all, and they spoke very politely.

A few days later.

The Terran spaceship entered the Spirit Race, and then under the hospitality of the Spirit Race, temporarily resided in the Spirit Race's Cloud Valley Star.

Yungu Star is a star close to the Lingyun Heavenly Realm, and most of the alien races who want to enter the Lingyun Heavenly Realm will be placed in Yungu Star.

There were still a few days before the opening of the Lingyun Heavenly Realm, and Ye Tian was hanging out in Yungu Star, and the only place worth hanging out in Yungu Star was Yungu Tree City.

Cloud Valley Tree City is built on a huge spirit tree, the scale of this spirit tree is even comparable to an adult world tree, but it is not a world tree, but an ordinary spirit tree called the giant tree tree.

This tree is characterized by its large size and the effect of converging vitality, but other than that, there is nothing special.

Because the tree is large and can gather vitality, it is used by the spirits as the foundation of the city.

"Cloud Valley Tree City is good, if a god-level person with wood-based talent cultivates here, his cultivation speed will definitely far exceed that of the outside world. "

Ye Tian thought to himself.

In Cloud Valley Tree City, Ye Tian and the other five great gods of the human race looked around and bought some special products of the spirit race.

Suddenly.

Ye Tian saw a group of Protoss, about ten or so people.

"His Royal Highness Wanfa, he is the great god of the Protoss, let's avoid it!"

The Eagle Battle Daozi of the five great gods of the human race said in a low voice.

"No!"

Ye Tian waved his hand.

He knew what Eagle Zhan Daozi was worried about, their strength was far inferior to these great gods of the Protoss, and the human race was far from being the opponent of the Protoss now, so it was not suitable to clash with the great gods of the Protoss.

But he's not afraid!

In terms of strength, he is not afraid of these gods at all, and these gods cannot represent the entire gods at all, and they will not provoke a war between the human race and the gods because of these few gods.

Besides, there is too much separation between the Protoss and the Terrans, and if the Protoss really wants to attack the Terrans, the consequences are not something the Protoss is willing to bear.

"It turned out to be a friend of the Terrans!"

More than a dozen great gods of the Protoss walked towards Ye Tian's side.

Suddenly.

A great god at the head stared at Ye Tian and said, "You should be His Royal Highness the Ten Thousand Laws of the Human Race, right?"

"Yes, who are you?"

Ye Tian said lightly.

"Presumptuous, you don't even know His Royal Highness the Heavenly Monarch of our God Clan?"

Another Protoss god roared.

"Your Highness the Heavenly Monarch, I don't know!"

Ye Tian pouted.

His Royal Highness the Heavenly Monarch laughed: "His Highness Wanfa is known as the first genius of the universe, and it is normal not to know me. However, His Royal Highness Wanfa only dominated the emperor-level period, and it seems that he has not had a strong record until now, so how about we compete in the Lingyun Heavenly Realm this time. As for the bets, ten Origin Artifacts!"

"Your Highness Wanfa, you can't bet with him. Eagle Zhan Daozi hurriedly said: "His Royal Highness the Heavenly Monarch of the Protoss is a great god who has cultivated for 300,000 years, and he is a descendant of a supreme of the Protoss, and his talent is very high. Although his talent is not as high as His Highness Tianxuan, the rising star of the Protoss, His Highness Tianxuan has not really risen after all, while His Highness Tianjun has fully grown. It is rumored that His Royal Highness the Heavenly Monarch has been promoted to the Supreme Highness, and he will definitely be able to become the Supreme in the future. Now he is in the process of compressing his divine power, as long as he compresses to the limit, he will hit the galaxy level. Your Highness Wanfa must have surpassed His Highness the Heavenly Monarch of the Protoss, but there is no need to compete with him now!"

"Your Highness the Supreme Rank!"

Ye Tian smiled in his heart.

He wouldn't take a Supreme-level Highness in his eyes, after all, he was the son of the Era, even the top-level Supreme-level Highness was like an ant in his eyes, let alone an ordinary Supreme-level Highness like His Highness the Heavenly Monarch.

"Thank you Eagle Zhan Daozi for reminding me, but His Royal Highness the Heavenly Monarch won't put it in my eyes!"

Ye Tian said.

Eagle Zhan Daozi was stunned and looked at Ye Tian in shock.

Then.

Ye Tian said to His Royal Highness the Heavenly Monarch: "I can bet against you, but how to bet, we can't fight in the territory of the Spirit Clan, right?"

"No need to fight!"

His Royal Highness the Heavenly Monarch said: "We can only go deeper into the Lingyun Heavenly Realm than anyone, the Lingyun Heavenly Realm is very special, it can compress divine power, and the deeper you go into the Lingyun Heavenly Realm, the more terrifying the suppression power is." It is rumored that even the people of the Spirit Clan have never entered the true center of the Spirit Cloud Heavenly Realm, and the pressure there is not at all something that the Great God level can bear. If we go farther than anyone, then whoever wins, how about it?"

"Yes!"

Ye Tian nodded in agreement.

Actually, this bet doesn't mean much to him, but if he can suppress the Heavenly Monarch and God of the God Clan, he can also raise the celebrity race.

In small matters, anything that can crush the Protoss or other cosmic races, the high-level of the human race is happy to see it, as long as it is not too much, it doesn't matter.

"Hmph, Your Highness Wanfa, don't play tricks when you lose, let's go!"

His Royal Highness the Heavenly Monarch waved his hand and left with the other gods of the Protoss.

After His Royal Highness the Heavenly Monarch left, Ying Zhan Daozi said: "His Royal Highness Wanfa, His Royal Highness the Heavenly Monarch should not be underestimated, his divine power has been compressed to a very high level, and His Royal Highness Wanfa You should have compressed your divine power for not too long, this bet is more disadvantageous for you!"

"You'll find out in a few days!"

Ye Tian said lightly, without explaining too much.

Perhaps his immortal power compression is not as good as that of His Royal Highness the Heavenly Sovereign, but Ye Tian's total immortal power is far from being comparable to His Royal Highness the Heavenly Sovereign.

After all, Ye Tian's physical body limit had already reached an incredible level under the increase of the Eighteen Golden Body Technique and the Chaos Golden Desolation Technique.

Therefore, this is not so much a gamble, not that His Royal Highness the Heavenly Monarch is sending him ten origin artifacts.
